sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42389" key="e)rhmwth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρημ-ωτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">desolator,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θῆρα Μακηδονίας</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.115</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
